mechanics.excerpt: Negotiation is also useful for interpreting veiled messages_ successful Action Check means the gamemaster can spell out in black and white what might otherwise be hidden in the evasive language diplo mat might use _ This skill is also useful for haggling: Make an Opposed Negotiation Skill Check against the target merchant: suc cessful roll allows the character to bargain merchant down_ For every point by which the MoS beats the merchant's MoS_ the seller will reduce his price by percent (to minimum of 25 percent of the original asking price).
